name: Sync Management API
summary: API endpoints for triggering and canceling project data synchronization. Runs an external CLI command to scan the project and sync specification data, streaming progress events via SSE.
goals: Execute project sync via configurable CLI command
Stream sync progress to connected clients in real-time

acceptanceCriteria.given: a project path and sync configuration
acceptanceCriteria.then: the sync engine runs the CLI command and streams progress events

specDetail.description: API routes for sync management. POST /api/graph/sync starts the sync process by running a configurable CLI command via sync-engine, streaming progress events via SSE. POST /api/graph/sync/cancel terminates the running sync process. The sync engine manages process lifecycle, tracks the base git commit, and archives results with timestamps.
parameters: POST /api/graph/sync: body requires projectPath, optional storageLocation and syncType
Sync types: full (complete rescan) or incremental
Progress streamed as SSE events during sync execution
Sync results archived with timestamp in history directory

constraints: projectPath must be an absolute path
Only one sync per project can run at a time
Sync command must be configured in server settings
Cancel kills the sync child process, may leave partial data
Sync timeout depends on project size, no hard limit

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: refactor(specs): migrate spec tree to unified node folder structure
